mapper.select: SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , DVC_OFW_AMNT , INST_ORGIN_AMNT , INST_MNTH_CNT , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_NAME , MODEL_ID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNUM FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{svcCntrNo} AND APP_END_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) WHERE RNUM = 1

SELECT A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.CUSTOMER_ID AS CUST_ID , A.MODEL_NAME , A.MODEL_ID , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CNTR_MOBILE_NO , A.SUB_STATUS , A.DOBYYYYMMDD , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS USER_NAME , A.USER_SSN AS unUserSSn , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , B.CUSTOMER_ID , B.CUSTOMER_TYPE , A.PPPO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID
AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO= TRIM(#{cntrMobileNo})
AND UPPER(REPLACE(A.SUB_LINK_NAME,' ','')) = UPPER(REPLACE(#{subLinkName},' ',''))
AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C'
